allow: PowerShell($p = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if \($p\) { $p } else { "no node found" })
PowerShell(\(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "npx:"; \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
